description: LinkedParaT (bold=on, sz=28) linked to LinkedCharT (italic=on, basedOn BaseCharT(underline=on)). ChildPara basedOn LinkedParaT (color=00FF00). Tests whether linked overlay leaks into child styles via basedOn.

expected.para_1: bold=on (para), sz=28 (para), italic=on (linked char raw), underline=on (linked char basedOn via BaseCharT)
expected.para_2: bold=on (from LinkedParaT via basedOn), sz=28 (LinkedParaT), color=00FF00 (ChildPara). NO italic, NO underline — linked overlay from LinkedParaT should not leak into ChildPara.
